# Stepkai

> Stepkai is an AI-powered interview readiness platform that helps software engineers prepare for technical interviews. It analyzes real job descriptions, builds personalized preparation plans, runs AI-graded mock interview practice, and provides a real, community-verified bank of company-specific interview questions.

## Primary topics

- Interview preparation for software engineers
- Technical interview questions (DSA, System Design, coding rounds)
- HR and behavioral interview questions
- Company-specific interview processes and rounds
- Java, React, Node.js, Python, TypeScript, SQL, AWS interview questions
- TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, Deloitte interview questions
- Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Meta, Netflix, LinkedIn, Uber interview questions

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.stepkai.com/): AI-powered interview readiness assessment and personalized study plans
- [Interview Questions](https://www.stepkai.com/questions/): Browse the full bank of real, verified interview questions
- [Companies](https://www.stepkai.com/companies/): Interview questions organized by employer
- [Roles](https://www.stepkai.com/roles/): Interview questions organized by job role
- [Interview Process Guides](https://www.stepkai.com/interview-process/): Round-by-round breakdowns of each company's interview process
- [Preparation Guides](https://www.stepkai.com/prepare/): Step-by-step guides for preparing at each company
- [Interview Guides](https://www.stepkai.com/guide/): Combined company + role preparation playbooks
- [Interview Experiences](https://www.stepkai.com/interview-experience/): Real candidate-reported interview experiences
- [Technology Comparisons](https://www.stepkai.com/compare/): Comparisons of technologies commonly tested in interviews
- [Trending Questions](https://www.stepkai.com/questions/trending/): The most upvoted interview questions currently
